flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Minnesota State University-Mankato fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Minnesota State University-Mankato rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (28.7% → 35.2%).
